description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the conoria/alpine-pandoc:latest Docker image and defines a single deploy stage with a pages job. In the before_script, install bash, git and openssh via apk, create a temporary file, clean any existing public directory, concatenate README.md, generate a markdown table for each src/*.user.js file including its version, SHA‑1, last‑modified date and matching URLs, append README_AFTER.md, run pandoc to convert the combined markdown to HTML and prepend src/head.html and append src/foot.html into public/index.html, write a provider JSON file to public/oe.json, minify the HTML with sed, copy all src/*.js files into public, compute SHA‑1, SHA‑256 and SHA‑512 checksums of the temporary file and of the public assets, generate checksum summary files in public, and finally remove the temporary file. The job script simply echoes "Nothing to do..." and the job publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
